title: web_fetch SSRF guard bypassed by hostnames, DNS rebinding, decimal IPs
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

Dim: Security. File: src/web.rs:15-49. validate_url string-prefix check unsound. Bypasses: hostnames bypass entirely; DNS rebinding between validate and send; decimal IPv4; IPv6 ULA/link-local/mapped not blocked; starts_with('172.2') wrong. Refactor: resolve with trust-dns-resolver, check IpAddr vs ip_network IANA registry, custom reqwest resolver re-validates at dial-time, block metadata endpoints.
